2604.12989.title: Accelerating Speculative Decoding with Block Diffusion Draft Trees
2604.12989.paper_summary: Speculative decoding accelerates autoregressive language models by using a lightweight drafter to propose multiple future tokens, which the target model then verifies in parallel. DFlash shows that a block diffusion drafter can generate an entire draft block in a single forward pass and achieve state-of-the-art speculative decoding performance, outperforming strong autoregressive drafters such as EAGLE-3. Vanilla DFlash, however, still verifies only a single drafted trajectory per round, potentially limiting its acceptance length. We introduce DDTree (Diffusion Draft Tree), a method that constructs a draft tree directly from the per-position distributions of a block diffusion drafter. Under a fixed node budget, DDTree uses a simple best-first heap algorithm to select the continuations that are most likely to match the target model according to a surrogate defined by the draft model's output. The resulting tree is verified efficiently in a single target model forward pass using an ancestor-only attention mask. Because DDTree builds on DFlash, a leading draft model for speculative decoding, these gains place DDTree among the leading approaches to speculative decoding.
2604.12989.paper_summary_zh: 推測解碼透過使用輕量級的草擬器來提出多個未來標記，加速自回歸語言模型，然後目標模型在並行中進行驗證。DFlash顯示，一個區塊擴散草擬器可以在單次前向傳遞中生成整個草擬區塊，並實現最先進的推測解碼性能，超越了像EAGLE-3這樣的強大自回歸草擬器。然而，原始DFlash每輪仍然僅驗證單一草擬軌跡，這可能限制其接受長度。我們引入了DDTree（擴散草擬樹），這是一種直接從區塊擴散草擬器的每位置分佈構建草擬樹的方法。在固定的節點預算下，DDTree使用簡單的最佳優先堆算法來選擇根據草擬模型輸出的替代品最有可能與目標模型匹配的延續。生成的樹在單次目標模型前向傳遞中使用僅祖先的注意力掩碼高效驗證。由於DDTree建立在DFlash之上，這是一個領先的推測解碼草擬模型，這些增益使DDTree成為推測解碼的領先方法之一。
2604.12989.author: Liran Ringel et.al.
